reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar para parar. La YPF ok, tiene buenos baños y buen shop. Afuera hay mesas de la YPF y atrás el ACA tiene un predio con mesas para sentarse, una lastima que este descuidado. También hay una parrilla en una carpa (foto).

(Translated by Google)
A great place to stop. The YPF station is good, with decent restrooms and a nice shop. Outside there are tables belonging to the YPF, and behind it the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) has a picnic area with tables, it's a shame it's neglected. There's also a grill in a tent (see photo).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzeWVfOFBREAE

reviews.comment:
Pechugas al plato con vegetales frías y mal cocidas. Combo de hamburguesas frías con papas semicocidas y frías también.
Mal organizado el sector de filas hacia las cajas. Si pueden sigan de largo y llévense vianda para el camino.

(Translated by Google)
Chicken breasts served with cold, undercooked vegetables. Cold burger combo with half-cooked, cold fries. The checkout lines were poorly organized. If you can, just keep going and bring your own food.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzOE9ySkpREAE
